name: Upstart Holdings, Inc.
business: Upstart is an artificial intelligence lending marketplace that facilitates unsecured and secured credit products including personal loans, auto loans, and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs). It serves consumers directly through Upstart.com and auto dealerships using Upstart Auto Finance software, and partners with banks, credit unions, and institutional investors who fund or purchase loans.

exposures.sentence: Upstart is the leading artificial intelligence ( AI ) lending marketplace.
